title: Gunstrike
description: Gunstrike spawns a nightly raid with gun-wielding raiders. Prepare for intense combat with firearms, startegic AI and dynamic raids that scale with difficulty.
body:
## **Abstract**

Gunstrike spawns a nightly raid with gun-wielding raiders. Prepare for intense combat with firearms, startegic AI and dynamic raids that scale with difficulty.

**Key Features**

*   Raiders and raids will scale with game difficulty.
*   Raiders will apply gun specifics like ranges, firerates, damages, ammo-specifics, sounds, animations.
*   Raiders will actively track down players and villages.
*   Raiders will shoot, reload, switch weapons, engage in melee combat.
*   Raiders will break down doors and burn structures in their path.
*   Raiders will drop, collect and manage weapons, ammo, and loot.
*   Raiders have different skins.

## **Weapon combinations**

Raiders will spawn with a combination of primary, secondary and melee weapon:

**Primary:**

*   TOMMY\_GUN
*   PUMP\_SHOTGUN
*   P90
*   M1\_GARAND
*   AWP
*   AR\_15
*   M4A4
*   HUNTING\_RIFLE
*   SSG08
*   AK47
*   LMG
*   AUTO\_SNIPER
*   LONGARM\_TAC
*   STEYER\_AUG

**Secondary:**

*   REVOLVER
*   MAGNUM
*   GLOCK
*   DEAGLE
*   REVOLVER\_SCOPED

**Melee:**

*   IRON\_SWORD
*   GOLDEN\_SWORD
*   DIAMOND\_SWORD
*   NETHERITE\_SWORD
*   IRON\_AXE
*   GOLDEN\_AXE
*   DIAMOND\_AXE
*   NETHERITE\_AXE

## **Difficulty scaling**

The game difficulty setting will impact the raiders in following ways:

**Easy:**

*   high dropchance of ammo and weapons
*   low hit accurancy
*   low damage
*   low health

**Normal:**

*   average dropchance of ammo and weapons
*   average hit accurancy
*   average damage
*   average health

**Hard:**

*   low dropchance of ammo and weapons
*   high hit accurancy
*   high damage
*   high health

## **Gunstrike command**

You may use following command to trigger a raid:

`/gunstrike <target_player> <amount_raiders>`


## **Required dependencies**

This mod requires [guns-plusplus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/guns++) to run.
